creator: freebsd-ports@jan0sch.de
text:
Created attachment 169651
Patch file for the port.

Hi,

I've included a patch to update fwknop to the current version (2.6.8).

While working on this I came to realise that the configuration files access.conf and fwknopd.conf will be deleted with the current port config upon update, deinstall or reinstall! Therefore I have adjusted the Makefile and the pkg-plist file to prevent this.

Regards,

Jens
